title: Vera Bradley (VRA) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Vera Bradley reported Q3 earnings of $0.20 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.08 per share by 150%. Prior year EPS was $0.18 per share. Revenue was $124.04 million, surpassing consensus by approximately 3%. Prior year revenues were $134.74 million. The earnings surprise demonstrated the company's ability to exceed expectations despite year-over-year revenue decline.
